block.header: yakumwotatu idumwo yapyegaki tumagomwi ni yapyegaki tukuru so no yapyegaki wo

sentence.transcription: so no ya pye gaki wo

block.header: yatipoko no kamwi no mikoto pa yasima kuni tuma makikanete topodoposi kwosinokuni ni sakasi mye wo ari to kikasite kupasi mye wo ari to kikosite saywobapi ni aritatasi ywobapi ni arikaywopase tati ga wo mo imada tokazute osupi wo mo imada tokaneba wotomye no nasu ya itatwo wo osoburapi wa ga tatasereba pikodurapi wa ga tatasereba awoyama ni nuye pa nakinu sanwotutori kigisi pa toyomu nipatutori kakye pa naku uretaku mo naku naru tori ka ko no tori mo utiyamekosene isitapuya amapasedukapi koto no katarigoto mo ko woba

yatipoko no kamwi no mikoto nuyekusa no mye ni si areba wa ga kokoro urasu no tori zo ima koso pa wadori ni arame noti pa nadori ni aramu wo inoti pa na sisetamapi so isitapuya amapasedukapi koto no katarigoto mo ko woba awoyama ni pi ga kakuraba nubatamano ywo pa idenamu asapi no wemisakaye kite takudunwono sirwoki tadamuki awayukino wakayaru mune wo sodataki tadakimanagari matamade tamade sasimaki mwomwonagani i pa nasamu wo ayani na kwopwikikosi yatipoko no kamwi no mikoto koto no katarigoto mo ko woba

sentence.transcription: na dori ni ara mu wo

block.header: nubatamano kurwoki mikyesi wo matubusani toriyosopi okitutori munamiru toki patatagi mo kore pa pusapazu pyetunami so ni nukiute swonidori no awoki mikyesi wo matubusani toriyosopi okitutori munamiru toki patatagi mo ko mo pusapazu pyetunami so ni nukiute yamagata ni makisi atate tuki somekwi ga siru ni simekoromo wo matubusani toriyosopi okitutori munamiru toki patatagi mo ko si yorosi itwokwoyano imwo no mikoto muratori no wa ga mureinaba piketori no wa ga pikeinaba nakazi to pa na pa ipu tomo yamato no pitomotosusuki unakabusi na ga nakasamaku cd no kwiri ni tatamu zo wakakusano tuma no mikoto koto no katarigoto mo ko woba

yatipoko no kamwi no mikoto ya a ga opokuninusi na koso pa wo ni imaseba utimwiru sima no sakizaki kakimwiru iswo no saki otizu wakakusano tuma motaserame a pa mo yo mye ni si areba na wo kite wo pa nasi na wo kite tuma pa nasi ayakaki no pupaya ga sita ni musibusuma nikwoya ga sita ni takubusuma sayagu ga sita ni awayuki no wakayaru mune wo takudunwono sirwoki tadamuki sodataki tadakimanagari matamade tamade sasimaki mwomwonagani i wo si nase toyomiki tatematurase
ame n aru ya ototanabata no unagaseru tama no misumaru misumaru ni anadama pa ya mitani putawatarasu adisikwitakapwikwone no kamwi so

sentence.kanji: 多迦比古泥能迦微曾也

block.header: akadama pa wo sape pikaredo siratama no kimi ga yosopi si taputwoku arikyeri
okitutori kamwodwoku sima ni wa ga winesi imwo pa wasurezi yo no kotogoto ni

uda no takakwi ni sigiwana paru wa ga matu ya sigi pa sayarazu isukupasi kudira sayaru kwonami ga na kopasaba tatisoba no mwi no nakyeku wo kokwisi pwiwene upanari ga na kopasaba itisakakwi mwi no opokyeku wo kokwida pwiwene ee siyakwosiya ko pa inogopu so aa siyakwosiya ko pa azawarapu so

osaka no opomurwoya ni pito sapani kiiri wori pito sapani iri wori tomo mitumitusi kume no kwo ga kubututui isitutui moti utite si yamamu mitumitusi kume no kwora ga kubututui isitutui moti ima utaba yorasi
mitumitusi kume no kwora ga apapu ni pa kamira pitomoto sone ga moto soneme tunagite utite si yamamu
mitumitusi kume no kwora ga kakimoto ni uwesi pazikami kutipipiku ware pa wasurezi utite si yamamu
kamukazeno isenoumi no opwisi ni papimotoporopu sitadami no ipapimotopori utite si yamamu
tatanamete inasanoyama no konoma ywo mo iyukimamworapi tatakapeba ware pa ya wenu simatutori ukapi ga tomo ima suke ni kone
yamato no takasazinwo wo nana yuku wotomyedomo tare wo si makamu
katugatu mo iya sakidateru ye wo si makamu
ametutu tidori masitoto nado sakyeru twome
wotomye ni tadani apamu to wa ga sakyeru twome

sentence.transcription: wa ga sak yeru two me

block.header: asipara no sikyesiki woya ni sugatatami iya saya sikite wa ga putari nesi

sentence.transcription: wa ga puta ri ne si

block.header: sawigapa ywo kumwo tatiwatari unebwiyama konopa sayaginu kaze pukamu to su
unebwiyama piru pa kumwo towi yupu sareba kaze pukamu to so konopa sayagyeru
mimakwiiribikwo pa ya mimakwiiribikwo pa ya ono ga wo wo nusumi sisemu to siri tu two ywo iyukitagapi mapye tu two ywo iyukitagapi ukakapaku siranito mimakwiiribikwo pa ya
yatumesasu idumwotakyeru ga pakyeru tati tudura sapa maki samwi nasi ni apare

sentence.transcription: sa mwi na si ni apare

block.header: sanesasi sagamu no wonwo ni mwoyuru pwi no ponaka ni tatite twopisi kimi pa mo
nipibari tukupa wo sugwite ikuywo ka neturu
kaga nabete ywo ni pa kokonoywo pi ni pa towoka wo

sentence.transcription: pi ni pa towo ka wo

block.header: pisakatano amenokaguyama twokama ni sawataru kubi pipabosotawayagapina wo makamu to pa are pa suredo sanemu to pa are pa omopedo na ga kyeseru osupi no suswo ni tukwi tatinikyeri
takapikaru pinomikwo yasumisisi wa ga opokimi aratamano tosi ga kipureba aratamano tukwi pa kipeyuku ubenaubena kimi matigatani wa ga kyeseru osupi no suswo ni tukwi tatanamu yo
wopari ni tadani mukapyeru wotu no saki n aru pitotumatu ase wo pitotumatu pito ni ariseba tati pakemasi wo kinu kisemasi wo pitotumatu ase wo
yamato pa kuni no maporoba tatanaduku awokakiyamagomoreru yamato si urupasi
inoti no matakyemu pito pa tatamikomo pyeguri no yama no kumakasi no pa wo uzu ni sase so no kwo
pasikyeyasi wagipye no kata ywo kumwowi tati ku mo
wotomye no toko no bye ni wa ga okisi turuki no tati so no tati pa ya
nadukino ta no inagara ni inagara ni papimotoporopu tokorodura
asazinwopara kosi nadumu swora pa yukazu asi ywo yuku na
umiga yukeba kosi nadumu opokapara no uwegusa umiga pa isaywopu
pama tu titori pama ywo pa yukazu iswodutapu
iza agi purukuma ga itate opazupa nipodorino apuminoumi ni kaduki sena wa
ko no miki pa wa ga miki narazu kusi no kami tokoyo ni imasu ipatatasu sukunamikamwi no kamupoki pokikuruposi toyopoki pokimotoposi maturikosi miki zo asazu wose sasa

sentence.transcription: wa ga mi ki nara zu

block.header: ko no miki wo kamikyemu pito pa so no tudumi usu ni tatete utapitutu kamikyere kamo mapitutu kamikyere kamo ko no miki no miki no ayani utadanwosi sasa
tibano kadunwo wo mireba mwomwotidaru yanipa mo miyu kuni no po mo miyu

sentence.transcription: kuni no po mo mi yu

block.header: ko no kani ya iduku no kani mwomwodutapu tunuga no kani yokosarapu iduku ni itaru itidisima misima ni twoki mipodorino kadukiikiduki sinadayupu sasanamidi wo sukusukuto wa ga imaseba ya kopata no miti ni apasisi wotomye usirode pa wodate rokamo panami pa sipipisi nasu itipiwi no wanisa no ni wo patuni pa pada akarakemi sipani pa nigurwoki yuwe mitugurino so no naka tu ni wo kabu tuku mapwi ni pa atezu maywogaki koni kakitare apasisi womina ka moga to wa ga misi kwora kaku moga to a ga misi kwo ni utatakedani mukapi woru kamo iswopi woru kamo

sentence.transcription: so no naka tu ni wo
ma pwi ni pa ate zu
wa ga mi si kwo ra
a ga mi si kwo ni

block.header: iza kwodomo nwobiru tumi ni piru tumi ni wa ga yuku miti no kagupasi panatatibana pa potuye pa tori wigarasi siduye pa pito torigarasi mitugurino naka tu ye no potumwori akarawotomye wo iza sasaba yorasi na
midu tamaru yosami no ike no wigupiuti ga sasikyeru sirani nunapa kuri papekyeku sirani wa ga kokoro si zo iya wokonisite ima zo kuyasiki
mitinosiri kwopadawotomye wo kamwi no goto kikoyesikadomo apimakuramaku
mitinosiri kwopadawotomye pa araswopazu nesiku wo si zo mo urupasimi omopu

sentence.transcription: ne siku wo si zo mo

block.header: pomuta no pinomikwo oposazaki oposazaki pakaseru tati moto turugi suwe puyu puyukwi no sukara ga sitakwi no sayasaya
kasi no pu ni yokusu wo tukuri yokusu ni kamisi opomiki umarani kikosi moti wose marogati
susukori ga kamisi miki ni ware wepinikyeri kotonagusi wegusi ni ware wepinikyeri
tipayaburu udi no watari ni sawotwori ni payakyemu pito si wa ga mwokwo ni komu

sentence.transcription: wa ga mwokwo ni ko mu

block.header: tipayapito udi no watari ni watarize ni tateru adusayumi mayumi ikiramu to kokoro pa mopedo itoramu to kokoro pa mopedo motopye pa kimi wo omopide suwepye pa imwo wo omopide iranakyeku soko ni omopide kanasikyeku koko ni omopide ikirazu so kuru adusayumi mayumi
okipye ni pa wobune turaraku kurwozaya no masadukwo wagimwo kuni pye kudarasu
ositeruya nanipa no saki ywo idetatite wa ga kunimireba apasima onogorosima adimasanosima mo miyu saketusima miyu
yamagata ni makyeru awona mo kibwipito to tomoni si tumeba tanwosiku mo aru ka
yamatopye ni nisi pukiagete kumwobanare soki wori tomo ware wasureme ya
yamatopye ni yuku pa ta ga tuma komoridu no sita ywo papetutu yuku pa ta ga tuma

tuginepuya yamasirogapa wo kapa nobori wa ga noboreba kapanope ni opwidateru sasibu wo sasibu no kwi si ga sita ni opwidateru pabiroyutumatubaki si ga pana no teriimasi si ga pa no piroriimasu pa opokimi rokamo
tuginepuya yamasirogapa wo miya nobori wa ga noboreba awoniyosi nara wo sugwi wodate yamato wo sugwi wa ga migaposi kuni pa kadurakwitakamiya wagipye no atari
yamasiro ni isikye toriyama isikye isikye a ga pasiduma ni isikiapamu kamo
mimoro no so no takakwi n aru opowikwo ga para opowikwo ga para ni aru kimwo mukapu kokoro wo dani ka apiomopazu aramu

sentence.transcription: so no taka kwi n aru

block.header: tuginepuya yamasiromye no kokupa moti utisi opone nezirwono sirwotadamuki makazukyeba koso sirazu to mo ipame

sentence.transcription: sira zu to mo ipa me

block.header: yamasiro no tutukwi no miya ni monomawosu a ga se no kimi pa namitagumasi mo

sentence.transcription: a ga se no kimi pa

block.header: tuginepu yamasiromye no kokupa moti utisi opone sawasawani na ga ipyese koso utiwatasu yagapaye nasu kiiri mawikure
yata no pitomotosuge pa kwo motazu tati ka arenamu atarasugapara koto wo koso sugepara to ipame atarasugasimye
yata no pitomotosuge pa pitori wori tomo opokimi si yosi to kikosaba pitori wori tomo
myedori no wa ga opokimi no orosu pata ta ga tane rokamo
takayukuya payabusawake no miosupigane
pibari pa ame ni kakeru takayukuya payabusawake sazaki torasane
pasitateno kurapasiyama wo sagasimito ipa kakikanete wa ga te torasu mo

sentence.transcription: wa ga te tora su mo

block.header: pasitateno kurapasiyama pa sagasikyedo imwo to noboreba sagasiku mo arazu
tamakiparu uti no aso na koso pa yo no nagapito sworamitu yamatonokuni ni kari kwomu to kiku ya

sentence.transcription: kari kwo mu to kiku ya

block.header: takapikaru pinomikwo ube si koso twopitamape ma koso ni twopitamape are koso pa yo no nagapito sworamitu yamatonokuni ni kari kwomu to imada kikazu
na ga mikwo ya tupini siramu to kari pa kwomu rasi
karanwo wo sipo ni yaki si ga amari koto ni tukuri kakipiku ya yura no two no twonaka no ikuri ni puretatu nadu no kwi no sayasaya
tadipinwo ni nemu to siriseba tatugomo mo motite komasi mono nemu to siriseba
panipuzaka wa ga tati mireba kagirwopwi no mwoyuru ipyemura tuma ga ipye no atari
oposaka ni apu ya wotomye wo miti twopeba tadani pa norazu tagimati wo noru
asipikwino yamada wo tukuri yamadakami sitabwi wo wasise sitadwopi ni wa ga twopu imwo wo sitanaki ni wa ga naku tuma wo kozo koso pa yasuku pada pure
sasaba ni utu ya arare no tasidasini winetemu noti pa pito pa kayu tomo

sentence.transcription: wi ne te mu noti pa

block.header: urupasi to sane si saneteba karikomono midareba midare sane si saneteba

sentence.transcription: sa ne si sa ne teba
sa ne si sa ne teba

block.header: opomapye womapye sukune ga kanatwokage kaku yorikone ame tatiyamemu
miyapito no ayupi no kwosuzu otiniki to miyapito toyomu satwobito mo yume
amadamu karu no wotomye ita nakaba pito sirinu besi pasa no yama no patwo no sitanaki ni naku
amadamu karuwotomye sitatani mo yorinete topore karuwotomyedomo
amatobu tori mo tukapi so tadugane no kikoyemu toki pa wa ga na twopasane
opokimi wo sima ni paburaba punaamari igapyerikomu zo wa ga tatami yume koto wo koso tatami to ipame wa ga tuma pa yume
natukusano apine no pama no kakigapi ni asi pumasu na akasite topore
kimi ga yuki ke nagaku narinu yamataduno mukape wo yukamu matu ni pa matazi

komorikuno patusenoyama no opowo ni pa pata paridate sawowo ni pa pata paridate opowo ni si naka sadamyeru omopiduma apare tukuyumino koyaru koyari mo adusayumi tateritateri mo noti mo torimiru omopiduma apare

komorikuno patusenokapa no kami tu se ni ikupi wo uti simwo tu se ni makupi wo uti ikupi ni pa kagami wo kake makupi ni pa matama wo kake matama nasu a ga mopu imwo kagami nasu a ga mopu tuma ari to ipaba koso yo ipye ni mo yukame kuni wo mo sinwopame

kusakabye no koti no yama to tatamikomo pyeguri no yama no kotigoti no yama no kapi ni tatizakayuru pabirokumakasi moto ni pa ikumidake opwi suwepye ni pa tasimidake opwi ikumidake ikumi pa nezu tasimidake tasi ni pa winezu noti mo kumi nemu so no omopiduma apare

comment.raw: multi-clause,CP-FINAL,17@曾能淤母比豆麻阿波禮,*

sentence.transcription: tasi ni pa wi ne zu

sentence.kanji: 曾能淤母比豆麻阿波禮

block.header: mimoro no itukasi ga moto kasi ga moto yuyusiki kamo kasiparawotomye
piketa no wakakurusubara wakakupe ni winetemasi mono oinikyeru kamo
mimoro ni tuku ya tamakaki tukiamasi ta ni ka mo yoramu kamwi no miyapito

sentence.transcription: ta ni ka mo yora mu

block.header: kusakaye no iriye no patisu panabatisu mwi no sakaribito tomosiki rokamo
agurawi no kamwi no mite moti piku koto ni mapi suru womina tokoyo ni moka mo

miyesinwo no womurwo ga take ni sisi pusu to tare so opomapye ni mawosu yasumisisi wa ga opokimi no sisi matu to agura ni imasi sirwotapeno swote kiswonapu takwomura ni amu kakituki so no amu wo akidu payagupi kaku no goto na ni opamu to sworamitu yamatonokuni wo akidusima to pu
yasumisisi wa ga opokimi no aswobasisi sisi no yamisisi no utaki kasikwomi wa ga nigenoborisi ariwo no pari no kwi no yeda
wotomye no ikakuru woka wo kanasuki mo ipoti moga mo sukibanuru mono

makimuku no pisiro no miya pa asapi no pideru miya yupupi no pigakeru miya take no ne no nedaru miya ko no ne no nebapu miya yaponiyosi ikiduki no miya makwi saku pi no mikadwo nipinapeya ni opwidateru mwomwodaru tukwi ga ye pa potuye pa ame wo opyeri naka tu ye pa aduma wo opyeri siduye pa pina wo opyeri potuye no ye no uraba pa naka tu ye ni otipurabape naka tu ye no ye no uraba pa simwo tu ye ni otipurabape siduye no ye no uraba pa arikinuno mipye no kwo ga sasagaseru midutamauki ni ukisi abura otinadusapi mina koworokoworoni ko si mo ayani kasikwosi takapikaru pinomikwo koto no katarigoto mo ko woba

yamato no ko no taketi ni kwodakaru iti no tukasa nipinapeya ni opwidateru pabiroyutumatubaki so ga pa no piroriimasi so no pana no teriimasu takapikaru pinomikwo ni toyomiki tatematurase koto no katarigoto mo ko woba
mwomwosikwino opomiyapito pa uduratori pire torikakete manabasira wo yukiape nipasuzume uzusumariwite kyepu mo ka mo sakamiduku rasi takapikaru pi no miyapito koto no katarigoto mo ko woba
minasosoku omi no wotomye podari torasu mo podari twori kataku tworase sitagataku yagataku tworase podari tworasu kwo
yasumisisi wa ga opokimi no asatwo ni pa iyoridatasisi yuputwo ni pa iyoridatasu wakidukwi ga sita no ita ni moga ase wo
opomiya no woto tu patade sumi katabukyeri
opotakumi wodinami koso sumi katabukyere
opokimi no kokoro wo yurami omi no kwo no yapye no sibakaki iritatazu ari
sipose no nawori wo mireba aswobi kuru sibi ga patade ni tuma tateri miyu
opokimi no mikwo no sibakaki yapuzimari simarimotoposi kiremu sibakaki yakemu sibakaki
opuwoyosi sibi tuku ama yo si ga areba ura kwoposikyemu sibi tuku sibi
asadipara wodani wo sugwite mwomwodutapu nute yuraku mo okime ku rasi mo
okime mo ya apumi no okime asu ywori pa miyamagakurite miyezu ka mo aramu

sentence.transcription: mi ye zu ka mo ara mu
